# thoth_policy_bundles (Data Source)

Reads versioned OPA/Cedar policy bundles for the tenant.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_policy_bundles" "all_active" {
  enforcement_mode = "enforce"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Optional

- `assignment` (String) Assignment filter (for example: all, agent:security-analyst-agent, coding-agent).
- `enforcement_mode` (String) Mode filter (enforce or observe).
- `framework` (String) Framework filter (OPA or CEDAR).
- `status` (String) Status filter (active, staged, paused, disabled).

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Bundle rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total bundles returned.
